steps: Peel and wash 2.5 pounds, russet potatoes .
In a large mixing bowl mix the grated potatoes and onions with 1 teaspoon, of salt , 0.25 cup, flour , and 0.25 cup, JUST Egg .
Cut up and grate the potatoes and 1 X, small yellow onion . Either with a food processor fitted with a grater disc or just with a box grater.
Cover bottom of a frying pan with oil and heat to medium-high.
Use a spoon to remove the water. Put the spoon onto the surface of the batter, pressing it down a little bit. Let the liquid seep in.
Flip, add more oil, and fry another 3-5 minutes. 00:03:00
Line a plate with paper towels.

If little kids are helping fry, be careful with dropping the batter onto the skillet as the oil can splash. Once the oil is hot, roll ¼ cup of the fritter mixture into a ball and place itinto the oil using a fish spatula or slotted spoon.
Transfer to the paper towel-lined plate.
Serve warm. Eat them with vegan sour cream.
creator: Anita Broellochs
